race.comment: IS IT SPECTACULAR (6) came back in trip when he stalked the speed for a respectable sixth over 1400m at this track in Midway class. Fitter now and gets a key jockey change out to his right trip. Expected to go close. PERFECT JUSTICE (9) slashing return from the outside draw when snagged back to last before finishing strongly to go under narrowly when fourth over 1400m here. Clearly come back well and the in-form Grima sticks from a better barrier. Shapes as the main danger. WHOA NELLIE (14) talented Deep Field filly going nicely through her grades this time in. Gets the right conditions again and can play a leading role jumping in class and trip. Each-way player. HORIZONS (11) in need of the run first-up and will keep improving as she jumps in trip. Stays in the mix.
